title: there's a mad man standing near my place! :p
content:
!-/gallery /pbox_images/photo-20050112-11 1312-0.jpg!

If your news is not up-to-date, you might think that Chuvit is the MP candidate for Chat Thai Party. Actually, he's #6 or #7 on the party list. I don't know how many candidates come from this party. %(me)I only know one. Oh two. Both come from TV circle% I have only seen "Chuvit" posters everywhere I go. What is the strategy here???
<!--more-->
